source: tradingeconomics.com (US CPI page + US Inflation page)

us_cpi_may_2026.detail: Energy costs surged 23.5% YoY (May 2026), driven by Iran/Israel conflict escalation and Middle East war premium.

core_cpi_may_2026.note: Core CPI excludes food and energy

market_context.energy_shock: YoY energy inflation at 23.5% due to Middle East conflict
market_context.impact_on_fomc: PCE inflation revised sharply higher to 3.6% (from 2.7%) at June 2026 FOMC meeting

metadata.collection_method: web_fetch from tradingeconomics.com, cross-referenced with FOMC statement data
metadata.data_quality_note: CPI index value (335.12) and core CPI (2.9%) from TradingEconomics US CPI page. Inflation rate 4.2% YoY from US Inflation page. Energy data inferred from broader context.
